mapper.select: SELECT cm.message_id AS messageId, cm.sender_id AS senderId, u.nickname AS senderNickname, cm.message_text AS messageText, cm.created_at AS createdAt FROM chat_messages cm JOIN users u ON u.user_id = cm.sender_id WHERE cm.room_id = #{roomId} AND cm.message_status = 'ACTIVE' AND cm.message_text IS NOT NULL ORDER BY cm.message_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT user_id FROM users WHERE public_id = #{publicId} AND user_status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT cm.message_id AS messageId, cm.sender_id AS senderId, u.nickname AS senderNickname, cm.message_text AS messageText, cm.created_at AS createdAt FROM chat_messages cm JOIN users u ON u.user_id = cm.sender_id WHERE cm.message_status = 'ACTIVE' AND cm.message_text IS NOT NULL AND cm.sender_id IN (#{requesterUserId}, #{targetUserId}) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM room_members requester_rm WHERE requester_rm.room_id = cm.room_id AND requester_rm.user_id = #{requesterUserId} AND requester_rm.member_status = 'ACTIVE' ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM room_members target_rm WHERE target_rm.room_id = cm.room_id AND target_rm.user_id = #{targetUserId} ) ORDER BY cm.message_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
